objective: Reconcile closed GitHub issue drift out of actionable governance backlog mirrors and harden the Overlord backlog validator so closed issue refs fail locally and in CI.
scope_boundary: Update hldpro-governance backlog/status mirrors for issue #352 only.
Harden the Overlord backlog alignment validator and focused tests.
Record PDCAR, execution scope, validation, and Stage 6 closeout evidence.
out_of_scope: Changing GitHub issue states except issue #352 closeout.
Changing backlog policy semantics outside closed-issue enforcement.
research_summary: Issue #352 follows a real drift observation: origin/main listed closed issues in actionable OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md In Progress rows. Existing check_overlord_backlog_github_alignment.py only required a GitHub issue reference, so rows with closed issues passed. The fix is to keep GitHub as canonical, reconcile the local mirrors, and make the local/CI gate verify open issue state for Planned and In Progress rows.

sprints.name: Backlog mirror reconciliation and validator hardening
sprints.goal: Remove closed issue refs from actionable backlog mirrors and make the validator fail future closed issue drift.
tasks: Move or remove stale closed issue rows from OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md actionable sections.
Reconcile docs/PROGRESS.md status mirror rows that reference closed governance issues as active work.
Update check_overlord_backlog_github_alignment.py to validate GitHub issue state for Planned and In Progress rows.
Add focused test coverage for closed In Progress issue refs.
Run local validation, Local CI Gate, Stage 6 closeout, PR checks, and issue closeout.
acceptance_criteria: No closed GitHub issue refs remain in OVERLORD_BACKLOG.md Planned or In Progress.
Closed work is represented in Done or already has equivalent Done coverage.
A closed issue in In Progress fails the validator before merge.
Local CI Gate and GitHub PR checks pass.

specialist_reviews.focus: Identify closed issue refs in actionable backlog rows and whether Done coverage already exists.
specialist_reviews.summary: Reviewer confirmed no Planned closed refs and identified In Progress closed refs #200, #212, #213, #214, #223, #224, #296, and #298; #298 already had Done coverage.

alternate_model_review.summary: This is a bounded mirror/validator hygiene slice, not a standards or architecture change requiring Tier 1 alternate-family review.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #352 may update backlog/status mirrors, the Overlord backlog validator, focused tests, governance workflow token wiring, and issue-specific governance evidence/closeout artifacts.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Run local validation, Stage 6 closeout, PR checks, merge, and close issue #352.

material_deviation_rules: If GitHub issue state lookup cannot run in CI, stop and fix workflow token wiring before merge.
If additional closed issue refs appear in actionable backlog sections, reconcile them in this slice only when they are governance mirror drift.
If a change requires broader backlog policy semantics, create a separate issue instead of expanding #352.
